# Figure assets

Place the approved FunBurd documentation images and article-derived figure exports in this folder before building the documentation.

The Markdown pages already reference the expected filenames. The principal assets are:

## Homepage and concept illustrations

- `funburd_logo.png`
- `method_dependency_map.png`
- `why_functional_burden.png`
- `funburd_model_schematic.png`
- `fig1_geneset_creation.png`
- `data_inputs_processing.png`
- `interpret_funburd_association.png`
- `functional_burden_pleiotropy.png`
- `normative_constraint_modeling.png`
- `p_jaccard_null_maps.png`
- `cnv_burden_correlations_concept.png`
- `gene_dosage_response_patterns.png`
- `workflow_overview.png` *(optional)*

## Main-figure exports

- `fig4_constraint.png`
- `fig5a_cross_variant_example.png` *(recommended example panel)*
- `fig5b_burden_correlation_heatmap.png`
- `fig5c_trait_category_network.png`
- `fig5d_del_dup_correlation_comparison.png`
- `fig5e_variance_explained.png`
- `fig6_dosage_response.png`

## Supplementary-figure exports

- `supfig01_tissue_jaccard_overlap.png`
- `supfig02_tissue_del_heatmap.png`
- `supfig03_tissue_dup_heatmap.png`
- `supfig12_independent_traits_genesets.png`
- `supfig13_recurrent_cnvs.png`
- `supfig14_excluding_large_cnvs.png`
- `supfig15_power_imbalance.png`
- `supfig16_brain_nonbrain_carriers.png`
- `supfig18_aou_replication.png`
- `supfig19_del_plof_concordance.png`
- `supfig20_female_del_heatmap.png`
- `supfig21_female_dup_heatmap.png`
- `supfig22_female_del_dup_categories.png`
- `supfig26_sldsc_tissue_heatmap.png`
- `supfig44_bmi_mediation.png`
- `supfig46_del_dup_gene_overlap.png`
- `supfig47_common_cnv_overlap.png`
- `supfig49_cnv_characteristics.png`

Keep the filenames unchanged so the Sphinx image references resolve correctly.
